女总裁碰瓷，非要跟我回家，哎。
“抄我家，还想我救你狗命？”
敌人得罪我，先用医术让他求生不得求死不能。
权贵惹我，跪在地上求饶也不会心软放过你。
任由你权势滔天，富可敌国，在我面前皆是云烟。
无敌有很多种方式，我掌握亿点点。（爆爽，计中计，局中局，一百万字，八百章的伏笔阴谋，你能否看得清楚）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/bf41c8bab6f0a674097c4b64efbcccbf","author":"将满盈","author_id":"","book_id":"7035894414635437064","book_name":"风流神医：刚退伍，你就骗我同居","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#601810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":124,"name":"都市修真","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=124&name=都市修真&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":27,"name":"战神赘婿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=27&name=战神赘婿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":26,"name":"神医","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=26&name=神医&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7035894996330873344","read_count":"26666","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2009802"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"975","tags":"都市修真,都市,战神赘婿,神医,无脑爽","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/1b332a77ada7e34c26eb8fc8277a99a8~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779447852&x-signature=is3Yd3yZx63LsV0laS10W52%2B4T0%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3087884064919331","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"12"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323190412841F8AD36570F0982544"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":5,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4015,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":509},"user_ac
